rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and rest on the same job-relevant reasoning: no formal people-management tenure, no developer-tools/build-systems ownership at scale, and no mobile-platform ecosystem experience for a Level II Engineering Manager role. The differences are ordinary run-to-run rewording (e.g. '12+ years' vs '13+ years', reordered strengths/concerns) and none of the variant's reasoning keys off the location change from various cities to 'United States'.
